desired_value_editing.phase3_note: Phase 3 edits only app-side JSON. No system setting is changed.

restore.strategy: No restore needed for read-only detection.

risk.warning: Auto switching should require clear game/process matches.
risk.what_can_go_wrong: False positives can apply the wrong preset if future writes are enabled.

controls.notes: NVIDIA App components and service containers.

source.phase1_risk_name: Fan mode/control through GCC or OEM paths

desired_value_editing.phase3_note: Phase 3 edits only app-side JSON. No system setting is changed.

restore.strategy: Blocked until a proven OEM restore path exists.

risk.warning: Fan control is experimental until an official reversible path is proven.
risk.what_can_go_wrong: Unexpected fan behavior, high temperatures, OEM service conflicts, or persistent config changes.

controls.notes: No fan modes, services, config files, or EC registers are changed in Phase 3.

controls.friendly_name: Launch app at startup future setting

desired_value_editing.phase3_note: Phase 3 edits only app-side JSON. No system setting is changed.

restore.strategy: Back up app config and any startup/scheduled-task state before enabling.

risk.warning: Automation can change system behavior on login or game launch.
risk.what_can_go_wrong: Bad automation can apply presets at the wrong time or make login noisy.

controls.notes: No startup entry or scheduled task is created in Phase 3.
